error_signature: Invalid Record Length: columns length is 5, got 13 on line 804
title: CSV file read error due to invalid record length
symptom: When running the workflow a second time, an error occurs stating 'Invalid Record Length: columns length is 5, got 13 on line 804'. This prevents the workflow from reading the appended CSV file correctly.
applies_when: Appending data to a CSV file
not_this_if: Error does not occur on the first execution
root_cause: The Extract from File node has a known issue with parsing CSV files that contain certain character encodings, such as Japanese CJK characters. This can lead to mismatches in the expected number of columns when reading the file after appending data.
fix_steps: Replace the read file and extract nodes in your workflow with the provided code workaround
Test the workflow again to ensure it reads the appended CSV file correctly
agent_instruction: Implement the suggested code workaround for the Extract from File node to resolve the CSV reading issue.
